CIPHER.329.cipherString: All human knowledge begins with intuitions, proceeds from thence to concepts, and ends with ideas.
CIPHER.329.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Immanuel Kant, encoded in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.329.author: Immanuel Kant

CIPHER.328.cipherString: Much corn lies under the straw that is not seen.
CIPHER.328.question: The bottom of the trophy has a Proverb engraved with a Fractionated Morse cipher. You are told that the quote starts with MUCH. What does it say?
CIPHER.328.author: Proverb

CIPHER.322.cipherString: There is only one science, physics: everything else is social work.
CIPHER.322.question: While analyzing the background noise from a physics experiment, you detect this pattern. It's a quote by James D. Watson, encoded using a Complete Columnar. The quote has SCIENCE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.322.author: James D. Watson

CIPHER.305.cipherString: Revolutions have always started in cafes.
CIPHER.305.question: Etched into the bottom of the cafeteria's mystery-cookie tray: this Baconian quote by Martin Firrell. You are told that the deciphered text starts with REVO. What does it say?
CIPHER.305.author: Martin Firrell

CIPHER.327.cipherString: Now that I'm a free agent I mean to make my own choices, and explain them to nobody if that's what pleases me.
CIPHER.327.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by James Blish, encrypted with an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.327.author: James Blish

CIPHER.308.cipherString: Do not counsel what is most pleasant, but what is best.
CIPHER.308.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Solon encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of ALMOST and polybius key of PARCHMENT. What does it say?
CIPHER.308.author: Solon

CIPHER.304.cipherString: You have to remember children are not usually very interested in what their parents do for a living.
CIPHER.304.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote by Julianne Moore, encoded as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher starts with You. What does it say?
CIPHER.304.author: Julianne Moore

CIPHER.310.cipherString: Who are we? We are the life force power of the universe.
CIPHER.310.question: You uncover this encoded note tucked behind a microscope slide. It's a quote by Jill Bolte Taylor, written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.310.author: Jill Bolte Taylor

CIPHER.323.cipherString: Haiku reading and writing can lead to a deeper understanding and appreciation of life and our environment.
CIPHER.323.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by William J. Higginson using the Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.323.author: William J. Higginson

CIPHER.315.cipherString: The day you start telling yourself you can, is the day you start knowing you will.
CIPHER.315.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Steve Maraboli, written as a Checkerboard Cipher encoded with a Polybius key of EXHAUSTING. What does it say?
CIPHER.315.author: Steve Maraboli

CIPHER.313.cipherString: Esta cosa... que puede ser entendido y no expresado, puede tomar un género neutro, y todo escolar lo sabe.
CIPHER.313.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Jeremy Taylor in Spanish, written in a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.313.author: Jeremy Taylor
CIPHER.313.translation: This thing...that can be understood and not expressed, may take a neuter gender;--and every schoolboy knows it.

CIPHER.316.cipherString: Let your trouble tarry till its own day comes.
CIPHER.316.question: Hidden inside the fortune cookie was a Proverb encoded using a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.316.author: Proverb

CIPHER.309.cipherString: Making decisions requires energy, but not deciding about whether to decide requires even more energy.
CIPHER.309.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by David Allen, written in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains even. What does it say?
CIPHER.309.author: David Allen

CIPHER.320.cipherString: If you use tact, you can say anything, then make it funny.
CIPHER.320.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Dane Cook, encoded using a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of STUDIO and polybius key of UNSPOILED. What does it say?
CIPHER.320.author: Dane Cook

CIPHER.311.cipherString: Whoever stole my copy of Microsoft Office, I will hunt you down and I will make you pay... You have my Word!
CIPHER.311.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote encoded using an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the the single letter U maps to the letter I. What does it say?
CIPHER.311.author: Unknown

CIPHER.312.cipherString: I want color and form to have contradictorily functions.
CIPHER.312.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this Complete Columnar code by Josef Albers. The quote has CONTRAD somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.312.author: Josef Albers

CIPHER.319.cipherString: Happy is the man who avoids dissension, but how fine is the man who is afflicted and shows endurance.
CIPHER.319.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Muhammad encoded in an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.319.author: Muhammad

CIPHER.318.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 1540 01089 76532 decode to?

CIPHER.307.cipherString: Fear means being afraid of the future. When you are not ready to accept the future moments, it becomes fear.
CIPHER.307.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this Aristocrat Cipher by Nithyananda using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.307.author: Nithyananda

CIPHER.314.cipherString: Happiness is a reward that comes to those that have not looked for it.
CIPHER.314.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Émile Chartier, encoded as a Complete Columnar. The quote has THOSE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.314.author: Émile Chartier

CIPHER.321.cipherString: I said I liked being half-educated; you were so much more surprised at everything when you were ignorant.
CIPHER.321.question: Your lab partner's retainer case suddenly clicked open to reveal this Aristocrat-encrypted quote by Gerald Durrell using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.321.author: Gerald Durrell

CIPHER.306.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 6410 8173 46259 decode to?

CIPHER.325.cipherString: Infinity is a territory toward which the inherent human impetus of conquest can be productively directed.
CIPHER.325.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Aristocrat puzzle by Vanna Bonta. What does it say?
CIPHER.325.author: Vanna Bonta

CIPHER.326.cipherString: If a good editor will let me tell my story with the right artist, I'm happy.
CIPHER.326.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote by Brian K. Vaughan, encoded using a Porta Cipher using a keyword of SETUP. What does it say?
CIPHER.326.author: Brian K. Vaughan

CIPHER.317.cipherString: All that stuff about mainstream social media is interesting enough, which is to say not at all interesting.
CIPHER.317.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Social media, encrypted using an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.317.author: Social media

CIPHER.324.cipherString: Every day is a new day, and you'll never be able to find happiness if you don't move on.
CIPHER.324.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Carrie Underwood encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of TEACHINGS. What does it say?
CIPHER.324.author: Carrie Underwood

CIPHER.303.question: A quote by Jimi Hendrix has been encoded using the Hill Cipher with a keyword of PROD for you to decode. What does it say?
CIPHER.303.author: Jimi Hendrix
